name: DRAFT
description: Task is being prepared or is blocked by an unmet dependency.

name: READY_FOR_MIMO
description: Specification, constraints and tests are complete; MiMo may start.

name: IN_PROGRESS
description: MiMo is actively working on this single task.

name: READY_FOR_REVIEW
description: Pull Request exists; implementation agent has stopped for review.

name: CHANGES_REQUIRED
description: Reviewer requested scoped corrections in the existing Pull Request.

name: OWNER_REVIEW
description: Technical review passed; owner should inspect the visible result.

name: OWNER_APPROVED
description: Owner accepted the result; merge is still a separate reviewed action.

name: DONE
description: Reviewed change was merged and project state was updated.

name: mimo
description: Implementation task assigned to MiMo Code.

name: cpp
description: C++ implementation or build work.

name: python
description: Python implementation, tests, reports or UI work.

name: architecture
description: Architecture, contracts, module boundaries or ADR work.

name: docs
description: Documentation-only or documentation-dominant work.

name: security
description: Security rule, secret handling or repository hygiene work.

name: risk
description: RiskEngine, risk limits, safety gates or kill-switch work.

name: research
description: Research, replay, backtest or evidence-gathering work.

name: blocked
description: Cannot proceed until an explicit dependency is resolved.

name: needs-clarification
description: Task requires a precise clarification before implementation.

name: needs-owner-decision
description: Owner decision is required before the task may proceed.

name: no-live
description: No live trading, production order entry or real credentials.
